title: OntologyAttribute
description: A typed attribute governed by an ontology concept.

dataType.description: Supported value type for an ontology attribute.

id.description: Stable identifier used by drafts and version diffs.

name.description: Name of the attribute within its concept.

iri.description: Canonical IRI of the OWL datatype property.

datatypeIri.description: Exact RDF datatype IRI preserved for ontology round trips.

unit.description: Optional unit IRI or display symbol.

enumValues.description: Allowed values when dataType is ENUM.

isIdentifier.description: Whether the attribute identifies instances of the concept.
